items.content_html: Tars 是一个 Obsidian 插件，支持 Kimi、豆包、阿里千问、百度千帆、智谱、DeepSeek 等等中文大型语言模型（LLMs）基于标签建议进行文本生成。Tars is an Obsidian plugin that uses OpenAI and other Chinese LLMs for text generation based on tag suggestions.
